===================
===================
=== dylan 11 August 2001.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan and Band
11 August 2001
Sedalia, Missouri
Missouri State Fair

-----------------
lineage: trade cdrs > eac > wavs > flacs > upload
comments:  last of the shows i had to share leading up to the 16 Aug Wichita show that we saw.  thanks to the artists, tapers and sharers!
----------------------
thanks to 'still on the road' for the following information:

1.Duncan And Brady (trad.)
2.Mr. Tambourine Man
3.Tangled Up In Blue
4.This World Can't Stand Long (Jim Anglin)
5.Crash On The Levee (Down In The Flood)
6.Positively 4th Street
7.Stuck Inside Of Mobile With The Memphis Blues Again
8.It Ain't Me, Babe
9.Desolation Row
10.Searching For A Soldier's Grave (Johnnie Wright, Jim Anglin, Jack Anglin)
11.Watching The River Flow
12.The Wicked Messenger
13.Leopard-Skin Pill-Box Hat


14.Love Sick
15.Like A Rolling Stone
16.I Shall Be Released
17.All Along The Watchtower
18.Knockin' On Heaven's Door
19.Highway 61 Revisited
20.Blowin' In The Wind


Concert # 1337 of The Never-Ending Tour. Second concert of the 2001 US Summer Tour. 2001 concert # 60. 
Concert # 242 with the 12th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Charlie Sexton (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), David Kemper (drums & percussion).
14, 79, 16, 18, 20 acoustic with the band.
3, 12 Bob Dylan (harmonica).
1, 4, 10, 16, 18, 20 Larry Campbell& Charlie Sexton (backup vocals).
Notes
Reviews from BobLinks.
LB-numbers for this concert: LB-0055, LB-7712.
First Bob Dylan concert in Sedalia, Missouri.
12 new songs (60%) compared to previous concert. 12 new songs for this tour.
Stereo audience recording, 125 minutes. 
inutes.
